title: heracleum sphondylium subsp. montanum
intro: Heracleum sphondylium subsp. montanum, also known as wild celery or mountain cow parsley, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heracleum sphondylium subsp. montanum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
